title: Sales Engineer | Industrial Cleaning Equipment
description:
• Basic up to $4k + AWS + Variable Bonus
  • $1.2k Transport Allowance
  • Annual increment + Yearly sales incentives
  • Monday – Friday, 8:15am – 5:30pm
  • Location: Gul Crescent

Responsibilities

  • Promote and sell a range of professional and industrial cleaning equipment, accessories, and tools to corporate customers, with a focus on oil & gas–related sectors
  • Manage and grow assigned accounts while actively prospecting and developing new customers
  • Build strong understanding of the product portfolio and customer operations to recommend suitable technical solutions
  • Engage customers to understand operational needs and provide application-based sales support
  • Conduct hands-on product demonstrations and, when required, deliver presentations to customers and management-level stakeholders

Requirements

  • Diploma in Engineering or equivalent
  • Minimum 2 years of sales experience involving both account management (farming) and new business development (hunting)
  • Prior experience dealing with customers in petrochemical, oil refinery, shipyard, marine, and oil & gas industries
  • Technical knowledge in mechanical, electrical, and related engineering disciplines
  • Familiarity with equipment such as high-pressure water jetting pumps, vacuum systems, valves, hoses, motors, engines, and robotic pumping systems
  • Able to communicate in both English and Mandarin to liaise with Mandarin-speaking customers
  • Possession of a valid driving licence and own vehicle

For consideration, kindly submit your CV by clicking “APPLY NOW”

**Only shortlisted candidates would be notified**

MTC Consulting Pte Ltd | 15C7752

EA. Registration No.: R24123733 | Chen Yit Keat

postedCompany.description:
MTC CONSULTING is a Recruitment and HR consulting firm that serves leading businesses and organizations across various industries. We provide total recruitment and staffing solutions, offering comprehensive scope of human resource services which include:

  • Executive Search
  • Permanent Placement
  • Contract Placement
  • Talent Acquisition
  • Foreign Worker Placement
  • Bulk/Mass Hiring Projects
  • Work Pass Application Services
  • Payroll Services

 

We recruit Professionals, Managers, Executives(PMEs), skilled, semi-skilled as well as blue collars workers across a diverse range of industries. At MTC staffing, we are also expert in placing qualified administrative, accounts, customer service, human resource personnel, production workers etc.

 

At MTC Staffing, everything we do is guided by our values – an unwavering commitment to always do the right things for our clients, our candidates and our people.
